< Home >

GET restapi/personal/person/roles/v1

Get list of roles for person.

Request Information

URI Parameters

None.

Body Parameters

None.

Response Information

Resource Description

Collection of Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.PersonRole

Response Formats

application/json, text/json

Sample: 
[
  "None",
  "None"
]

application/xml, text/xml

Sample: 
<ArrayOfPersonRole xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/Itslearning.RestApi.Entities">
  <PersonRole>None</PersonRole>
  <PersonRole>None</PersonRole>
</ArrayOfPersonRole>
